hints.title: Hint 1 — Stack
hints.content: Push the index of `'('` onto the stack. For `')'`, pop from the stack. If the stack is empty, push the current index as a new base. Otherwise, the valid length is `i - stack.top()`.

hints.title: Hint 2 — Dynamic Programming
hints.content: `dp[i]` = length of longest valid substring ending at `i`. If `s[i] == ')'` and `s[i-1] == '('`, then `dp[i] = dp[i-2] + 2`. If both are `')'` and `s[i - dp[i-1] - 1] == '('`, then extend.

hints.title: Hint 3 — Two-pass scan
hints.content: Left-to-right: count `(` and `)`. When counts match, update max. When `)` exceeds `(`, reset. Then right-to-left with opposite condition to catch unclosed left parens.
